absorption: Strong BID absorption detected at VAL (61890.5). Price is failing to break down despite significant negative delta (-274, -271), held by a large 1322 lot bid wall at 61900.
dom_observation: Large stacked bid wall of 1322 lots at 61900 is absorbing aggressive selling pressure, preventing a breakdown below the Value Area Low.
reasoning: Fiyat, guclu satis baskisina ragmen kilit VAL seviyesindeki buyuk bir alim duvarinda (BID absorption) duraksadigi icin dusus yonlu kirilim basarisiz oluyor ve bir donus sinyali olusuyor.
